testing_centers.notes: In-person and online proctored via Kryterion Webassessor

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name must match Webassessor registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. No access to Salesforce org. Proctor monitors via webcam.
renewal_options: Salesforce releases three major updates per year. For each release, certified professionals must complete a free maintenance module on Trailhead to retain their certification. No cost for maintenance.
target_audience: Individuals who have experience with setting up, governing, and optimizing the platform's data, processes and user access
recommended_experience: 6 or more months of experience as a Salesforce Platform Administrator

retake_policy.notes: Retake available after scheduling (no mandatory waiting period for first retake). Retake fee ~$100 for most exams.

objectives.title: Describe the information found in the company settings
Distinguish and understand the administration of declarative configuration of the user interface
Given a scenario, demonstrate the proper setup and maintenance of users
Explain the various organization Security Controls
Given a user request scenario, apply the appropriate security controls based on the features and capabilities of the Salesforce sharing model
Given a scenario, determine the appropriate use of a custom profile or permission set

domains.name: Object Manager and Lightning App Builder

objectives.title: Describe the standard object architecture and relationship model
Explain how to create, delete, and customize fields and page layouts on standard and custom objects
Given a scenario, determine how to create and assign page layouts, visibility on Lightning page layouts, record types, and business processes for custom and standard objects
Given a scenario, identify the capabilities and implications of the sales process
Given a scenario, apply the appropriate sales productivity features using opportunity tools
Describe the capabilities of lead automation tools and campaign management
Describe the capabilities of case management
Given a scenario, identify how to automate case management
Describe the capabilities of activity management
Describe the features of Chatter
Describe the capabilities of the Salesforce mobile app
Identify use cases for AppExchange applications
Describe the considerations when importing, updating, transferring, mass deleting, exporting, and backing up data
Describe the capabilities and implications of data validation tools
Describe the options available when creating or customizing a report or report type
Describe the impact of the sharing model on reports
Describe the options available when creating and modifying dashboards
Given a scenario, identify the appropriate automation solution based on the capabilities of the tool
Describe capabilities, use cases, and configuration for Flow
Describe capabilities, use cases, and configuration for the approval process
Describe the capabilities and use cases of Agentforce
Explain how to maintain, update, or install prompts and instructions in Agent Builder

official_study_resources.title: Salesforce Trailhead
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning platform with trails aligned to each certification

official_study_resources.title: Salesforce Exam Guide & Sample Questions
official_study_resources.notes: Free exam guides with sample questions on each credential page
